_doc: Regression baseline for the repaint evals. Gate on the DELTA vs this, not the absolute. See evals/README.md for the six gate rules. Sibling to evals.json — never merge in.
noise_band_note: Working gate ~6pp. Observed per-cycle spread: runs4-6=3.7pp, runs7-9=6.2pp, runs10-12=9.3pp (last inflated by one low-outlier run at 82.7pct — judge variance). Treat a lone low run as noise; gate on the 3-run mean.
method: Assertion-level pass-rate per run, averaged over 3 runs. Per-eval = median passed across the 3 runs.
history: 23-eval baseline (runs1-3)=88.4pct. Distillation (runs4-6) overlap rose to 91.5pct (+3.1pp). Absorb B/L (runs7-9)=88.3pct with eval-6/eval-12 regressions. Scope-guard fixes (runs10-12, THIS)=88.7pct: eval-6 recovered, eval-12 substantially recovered (1 to 3), eval-24 fixed (3 to 6).
tool_stall_note: A lone 0/N on an inspect/fixture eval is a single-shot/tool-less harness artifact. Judge per-eval by majority across runs.

known_weak.12: Register-disambiguation: model now PASSES the 3 substantive assertions (surfaces ambiguity, names both interpretations, does NOT build a full page) — dangerous behavior fixed. Residual: the conditional 'asks exactly ONE focused question' trails (consistent 3/4). Accepted — core behavior restored; chasing the last assertion risks plateau collateral.
